summary: Completed frontend testing of 'Accelera la crescita' feature in Partner sidebar. All features working correctly: sidebar section with Rocket icon, 4 collapsible items (Visibilità, Costanza, Monetizzazione, Direzione), navigation to category pages, item detail pages with 3 colored sections (Il problema/La soluzione/Il risultato), CTA buttons, and 'In arrivo' badges for coming soon items. No 'servizi extra' text found - correctly uses 'strumenti per accelerare' framing.
critical_code_review_comments: PartnerSidebar.jsx correctly implements ACCELERA_ITEMS array with 4 items and collapsible section
AcceleraCrescitaPage.jsx correctly implements CATEGORIES with all items and their properties
ItemDetailPage shows 3 colored sections: Il problema (red), La soluzione (category color), Il risultato (green)
Coming soon items (Ebook, Audiobook, Audiolezioni) correctly show 'In arrivo' badge and message
Items with hasCheckout=true (Avatar PRO, Sessione con Claudio/Antonella) open dedicated checkout components
Items with isStripe=true (Gestione Contenuti) show detail page with Stripe CTA
No 'servizi extra' text found in AcceleraCrescitaPage - uses 'strumenti per accelerare' framing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accelera la crescita feature fully tested. Navigation: Admin login → Partner tab → Sidebar shows 'ACCELERA LA CRESCITA' section with Rocket icon. Click to expand shows 4 items: Visibilità, Costanza, Monetizzazione, Direzione. Each item navigates to category page. Category pages show items with cards. Clicking items opens detail page with 3 colored sections or dedicated checkout component.

features_tested.Sidebar 'Accelera la crescita' section: PASS - Visible with Rocket icon, collapsible
features_tested.'Strumenti per accelerare' framing: PASS - Visible in back button text
